metrolink: When using the Metrolink network please ensure you have all your belongings with you at all times. Please check your seat before leaving the service. Unattended items may be removed without warning
headlines: EU sovereignty push gives tech buyers a new alphabet soup to swallow

crew_quote: "Well, it's a perfect day for a curry, isn't it? I mean, 14°C and partly cloudy—all you need is a bit of spice to heat things up!"
